titleStmt.title: SII 17.579: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 579. (A.R. No. 534 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Tyāgarājasvāmin shrine in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription contains portions of the praśasti, Tirumādu puviyeṉum etc., of Rājēndra II.

This records the gift of land by purchase from the peruṅguṟi sabhā of Vēlaṅguḍi, a brahmadēya in Tiruvārūr-kūṟṟam in Adhirājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, who made it tax-free in lieu of 140 kāśu received by them from Vēḷāṉ Māṟaṉ alias Śembiyan Ten••• of Paravai-chchuṟṟu-ppūṇḍi in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, for certain services including Na[ḍu]vil Rājēndran sandi to god Mūlasthānam-uḍaiyār at Tiruvārūr.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
taviyarkaḷāka nitiyuḷ nikaḻunāḷiṉuḷ Ikalveṭṭeḻuntu ceṉṟarumuṉaik koppat tākavamallaṉoṭu porucayappuriyuṅkālai yarinikarttaBeginning and right end lost.
jaṉmunti naṟpāṭu Etittu nerāmaraicarai neṭuvicum peṟṟi Antaravāṉattarampaiyar Etir koḷa Intiraloka meytiyapiṉ kuntaḷa naṟpaṭai
ḷitaṉ kuñcarameṟṟiṟ taṉnaṭar mel kūṟṟeṉak kaṭāvi terikaṇai mutaliyar porupaṭai vaḻaṅki moympiyal caḷukki tampi jayaciṅkaṉum poṟ pulaikkeci
ṉu mivar mutaliyar veṇṇali Araicarai viṇṇakatteṟṟi yāyiṭai Etir nilār kācilai turanta ceñcaramāri taṉ kuñcaramukattilun taṉ tiruttuṭaiyiluṅ kuṉṟu
ṟiya toṭukaḻal virar maṭiyavum vakaiyā torutaḷippukkap poru toḻil caḷukki veṟ ṟa veḻattai miṭal keṭa muṭṭuvitta toṟṟai velavaṉ nurattuyatta
kaṭiḻintu kulakula kulaintu talaimayir virittu veṉṉuṟa neḷittup piṉṉuṟa nokki vanṉiyarevaṉum vayaṟpaṭaikkuttaṉum koṉṉavil paṭaik kuṇṭamaṉum
ntalaiyāki veruviḻunṉoṭa meṉ koṇṭāṅ kurumatir karapattira mutal poru kaḷiṟa ṉekamum pariyiṉ ṟokutiyum Uriya teviyaraiyum varākavel koṭi mu
muṉaivayiṟ kavarntu porkaḷa vaḷarttup pārttivarānor muṉṉarum ceytaṟiyātatu piṉṉarum ceytame ṉṟeṇṇaṟ kariyatu kaiyakalan taṉṟiṉap
ḻiñir tan=tam putarupuṉalāl tikkunaḷ pe paṉ nokkarum kaḷattey vijaiyabhiṣe kam vicaimikac ceytu viraciṅkāsaṉam tiriya viṭṭer konaṅka
yyāniṉṟikaloḻuka nerṉtu taṉṟirukkātalanāṉa potalar teriyal kaṅkai koṇṭa coḻaṉaiyum Aṅkavaṉ ṟirumakanāṉa Irunilaṅ kāvalāṉ vanta perumāḷaiyum
vaḷavaṉ mummaṭi coḻaṉaiyum nirppaṭai viracoḻaṉaiyum vel maturān=takaṉaiyum tāramar tiraṭoḷ tanṉai tanṟirumakaṉ rājentracoḻaṉaiyum tarapati Irumaṭi coḻaṉai rājādhirājaṉ curatinaṉkuṇarum
coḻaṉ coḻakaṅkaṉ ṟoṭukaḻal luttamacoḻa neṉṟu cuṭarnavamaṇi puṉaintaru muṭicūṭṭi teṉṉavar mutaliyar niruparait tāṅkavar nilanavarkkaruḷi kārkkaṭali
kkaliṅkarmaṉ vīracalāmekaṉaik kaḷiṟṟoṭum paṭak katirmuṭi taṭittapiṉ muntaiyil koppattu vantaḻi caḷukki Āṅkermatiy paripavam Innanar nikala
Iṉpāyiṉa tuṟantu tuṉpam tavirap palaviratam talainiṉṟuvarkkaṭalkiḷanteṉak kiḷarpaṭai parappi vaṉṟuḷaṅka niṉṟārkali muṭakkāṟṟāramar purivuḻi
ṭiṟal mallaiyaṉ mutaliyar palapaṭai Araicarum porukaḷattaviya Irukayaṉ mutaliyar maṉṉa var tammoṭu maintaṉ mikkalanoṭu taṉṉilai
puritaṉṟaṇṭiṉa muṉṟāḷ ceṉṟorutaṉiveḻam muttuṭaliyāṅkavaṉai Irumaṭi meṉ koṇṭaruḷi poruvali māpperum pukaḻ mika vaḷartta koppara
ṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu Atirājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu brahmateyam velaṅkuṭi peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Innāṭṭut tiruvārur Uṭaiyaār śrīmulastā
n santikkum naṭuvil rājentran santikku pūjaikku veṇ(ṭ)ṭum nivantam ceyya rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭup paravaiccuṟṟuppūṇṭip pūṇṭi Uṭaiyaveḷāṉ māṟanāṉa cempiyan ten
ṭukkiṉa kācil nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu ṉūṟṟu nālppattaiñcināl kācu Onṟinukkup ponnaraikkaḻañcāka ponṉeḻupattirukaḻañcaraikku pon kaḻañcukku paṇaināraācat tāl nel
kalattukku tiruvārur Uṭaiyār śrīmulastānamuṭaiyaār kanmikaḷukkuc cantirātittaval Iṟaiyiliyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷḷur nilam vāṉavāyin tenkaraik kali
varaiye yaraikkāṇiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai sabhaiyom nilattukku merkkum tenpārkkellai Apimānameruvāykkā(l)lukku vaṭakkum �
ntikāmattu cappaṉnakramavittan nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai vāṉavāy ni(r)roṭukā(l)lukku teṟkkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam Onṟey Irumāvarai
nilam carivum naṅkai pattumāka nilam Onṟekāle Araikkāṇiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttaṟku kiḻpārkellai nantikāmattu cappampikramavittan makkaḷ nilattukkun tirumulaṭṭānan viṭaṅkan ni
lpālkellai Ūrvāykkālukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai sabhaiyom cikkaruṭai yān pattukku teṟkum Āka nilam Oṉṟekāle Araikkāṇiyum pāttukkaṇṭattu
ṟukkālum Uṟuppuṭṭūr kecuvakramavittan makan śrīvāsutevakramavitta nāṟṟukkālumāka nilam Iraṇṭumākkāṇikku kiḻpāṟkellai tirunāraṇa vākkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟ�
kellai Uṟuppuṭṭūr maturāntaka kramavittan nilattukku teṟkum Inilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum Āka Ivvaṉaittu nilamumāka nilam Iraṇṭarai Innilam Iraṇṭaraiyum Uṇṇi
ttukkuḻi Uḷḷatellām cantirātittaval śāśvatikamāka Iṟaiiliyāka viṟṟu kuṭuttom tiruvārūr Uṭaiyār śrīmulastānammuṭaiyār kanmikaḷḷukku velaṅkuṭi pe
Digital edition of SII 17.579 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
